name: HNMS Abraham Crijnssen
events: 19 Aug 1940 HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Lt. B. Poortman, RNN) departed Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies for Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies. (1)
20 Aug 1940 HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Lt. B. Poortman, RNN) arrived at Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies from Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
2 Sep 1940 HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Lt. B. Poortman, RNN) departed Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies for Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
3 Sep 1940 HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Lt. B. Poortman, RNN) arrived at Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies from Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
20 Apr 1942 HrMs K IX (Lt. T. Brunsting, RNN) and HrMs K XII (Lt.Cdr. H.C.J. Coumou, RNN(R)) departed Fremantle for Sydney. They were escorted by HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Lt. A. van Miert, RNN). (2)
3 May 1945 Around 0910 K/3, HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) arrived at Melbourne from Wellington.
She was escorted in by HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Cdr. S. Dobbenga, RNN(R)) which had joined around 1120 K/2. (3)
13 May 1945 HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) departed from Melbourne for Fremantle.
She is escorted until 0930 K/14, by HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Cdr. S. Dobbenga, RNN(R)). (3)
30 May 1945 HMS Vox (Lt. W.E.I. Littlejohn, DSC, RANVR) conducted A/S exercises off Sydney with HrMs Abraham Crijnssen (Cdr. S. Dobbenga, RNN(R)). (4)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
